name: Macaroni and Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Elbow macaroni, cooked (unsalted, drained, cooled to room temperature)
1/2 cup Process American cheese (cut in small pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix macaroni, cheese, celery, and onion.
2. Mix salad dressing, vinegar, and pepper thoroughly.
3. Stir the mixture into the macaroni until well combined.
- This yields 2 servings of 1 cup each.
- The recipe contains approximately 270 calories per serving.
